title: Sub-agent execution
description: Implement sub-agent spawning from within the main agent loop. Use case: context isolation for tasks where main agent doesn't need full context (web search, exploration, targeted code analysis). tk-ioxh evaluated the async model — close that task first. Design: sub-agent gets its own provider/session/tools subset, results returned as tool output to parent. Worktree support (isolated git state per sub-agent) is a stretch goal for this task.
